reviews.review_description: Fun , but waiting for an update

I got this hoping to play with somebody online. Every time I went to go for a match, there was no one to play against. The only players are the ones who practice with the open court practice and end up ranking up points but none of those players never play when on line.

This was such a good and fun game but unfortunately, it has been abandoned now. I just tried it again recently but there are no players online to play against so you are just stuck playing the same old tracks repeatedly. There should be law against abandonment of games.

reviews.review_title: A good and interesting game, but...
reviews.review_description:
I definitely challenged another player and the game was rather great.
However we can only make basic ground strokes from the baseline but we cannot make any drop shots or volleys !

reviews.review_title: Like it but it ne3ds a UPGRADE
reviews.review_description: I purchased this to play against others, however UNFORTUNATELY there has been not one match.Its been searching for an opponent since I purchase and still have found NOT ONE .. also it should allow you to pick the genre of music l..

*UPDATE

TL;DR; Another sad case of abandonment unfortunately....4/5

I bought this ages ago and got a lot of use out of it.  I really loved it and I do still enjoy it except there's really only a handful of tracks to replay again and again. I paid for the full version but it's never been  updated since then :(

 *OLD
I almost didn't even try this app because it just didn't seem as interesting from what I saw, but I saw that there was a free demo and I thought why not.... It really surprised me how much I loved it! I tried the demo a couple times over the last couple days and I think if they keep on releasing new songs and minor updates, I could play this for a long time! It is a great workout too, but doesn't feel like it in the moment at all. Will update after buying and trying the full version!! 5/5

I like this game it has an easy setting so can choose to sit or stand while playing. Great scenery landscapes stuff

reviews.review_title: Slam no updates nothing in year..disappo
reviews.review_description: Love it been playing for months..and it keeps getting better with the updates . SLAM IS A WINNER WITH ME❤️

reviews.review_title: Is it a rythm game or a tennis game?
reviews.review_description:
I like to game for the music and swing pattern. Never a ball in the net and feels good. Although I wonder if this is realistic. 😊.

More important, the match option to play against others. I have tried this game quite some time but NEVER found an opponent. Waiting and waiting.. this is a thing I really mis and was intentionally my reason for buying it.

The game as presented to me has little to do with tennis, it is a 5 song rhythm game where touching the ball is the cutting part of beat saber. The selections and options in the video are not shown to me, I can only select a song and start playing.

The motion is terrible and stuttery on my quest. I usually have no motion problems with heavier games, this game is just terrible.

No swings required, just touch the balls, and slightly determine the angle. Power or movement seems to make no difference.
Could there be more new tracks to choose from, please? I play this game everyday and really love it. But we’re stuck with the same tracks day in day out.
Developer of this great game is MIA. I hope he is alive and well and will return to work further on this
I like it very much! I've bought the full version and looking forward for update!

I really dig this game. The core gameplay loop is fun and enticing, and watching it develop as they refine and add has been a lot of fun. The multiplayer is tight as well.

Overall a great, solid game for fun or to work up a sweat. Easily worth the price.

👉webnetka*com💻metaquest*forumactif*com👈(FR🇫🇷 )
I bought slam because I really like the sensations, racquet in hand, and I like the somewhat uncluttered graphics too

Pity that the content is a bit limited (10 music +3 demo-music, and 2 modes game)
but we can spend some time scoring, or just as a rhythm game for physical exercise

There are indeed 2 game modes:

- the normal mode which will be more for scoring (you have to return the ball to the place indicated to score) But where are the rules?? No matter how much I look, I don't see anything indicated and it's not easy to monitor the points while playing
I don't really understand the color codes, the arrows, and not quite how the scores are calculated. DEVS, can you document?

- the extreme mode is + a stress release mode where we chain the blows in rhythm as in a rhythmic game, to do a little exercise in music. you can choose right or left hand, to work both side

Install the demo (not time limited) and make up your mind

edit: they made a youtube tutorial (accessible from inside the game), , add some environnements, add points to gain to unlock them, add some musics and differents things... 
Keep up the good job devs!

==================================
Pour échanger vos expériences et vos avis:

Pour les promos quest : 👉 webnetka*com 👈

Imagine beat saber and eleven table tennis had a baby, this game is it! Addictively fun with basic mechanics but hard to master. While this is a pre release, don’t be fooled with only 3 songs for now, this game has high replayability as you wanted to keep on going and learning how to play it. Even at this state, it’s already fun and engaging enough, looking forward to the full release!
This is a brilliant, fun game.  Can't wait to get the full version.

A really fun arcade/rythm/music/workout game, in a similar vein to Beat Saber and Synth Riders. 
I'm rubbish at real tennis, but playing this made me feel like a pro.
The music is fun and exciting, and the scoring system is easy to pick up and frustratingly addictive.
Really good game!

I WON A OCULUS QUEST 2 HEADSET COMING 1ST PLACE IN THERE FIRST EVER COMPETITION!.
Very good game for fitness!
Hand to eye coordination improving 100%.
More music choices to come and will be holding competitions also.
Cannot fault this game
slam away your troubles with this fast paced game. a great workout that gets you excited. a must for your collection.
